name: Ogdoadic Serpent Strike
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>溟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おお</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蛟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みず</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can send 1 monster from your hand or field to the GY, then target 1 Reptile monster in your GY with a different original Attribute than that monster; Special Summon it. During the Main Phase, if a monster is sent to your opponent's GY: You can send 1 Reptile monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Ogdoadic Serpent Strike" once per turn.
eff: You can send 1 monster from your hand or field to the GY, then target 1 Reptile monster in your GY with a different original Attribute than that monster; Special Summon it. During the Main Phase, if a monster is sent to your opponent's GY: You can send 1 Reptile monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Ogdoadic Serpent Strike" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
